name: Bicycle RTI — End-to-End Real-Time Intelligence
description: Complete data flow for the Bicycle Real-Time Intelligence hackathon demo. Covers streaming ingestion, medallion architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold), ML forecasting, ontology modeling, real-time alerting, and operational dashboards.

tasks.name: Raw streaming Bike Rentals
tasks.description: Eventstream ingesting sample bicycle rental data (station occupancy, bike counts, timestamps) into Fabric.

tasks.name: Raw Streaming Weather
tasks.description: Eventstream ingesting real-time weather data (temperature, wind, humidity, conditions) from OpenWeatherMap API.

tasks.name: Eventhouse
tasks.description: KQL-based real-time store. Receives streaming data from both eventstreams for hot-path analytics and KQL queries.

tasks.name: RTI Dashboard
tasks.description: KQL Dashboard showing live bike station occupancy, weather overlays, and real-time fleet status.

tasks.name: Bronze data
tasks.description: Raw landing zone. Eventstreams write to bikerental_bronze_raw and weather_bronze_raw lakehouses. NB02 handles streaming ingest.

tasks.name: Silver data
tasks.description: Cleaned & enriched layer. NB03 validates business rules, deduplicates, adds derived columns. NB03a joins weather context.

tasks.name: Golden data
tasks.description: Star schema dimensional model. NB04 builds fact/dim tables (fact_availability, fact_hourly_demand, dim_station, dim_weather, etc.).

tasks.name: Analyze and train
tasks.description: ML demand forecasting (NB06), geo-analytics hot spots (NB08), and KQL real-time queries (NB05).

tasks.name: Semantic Model
tasks.description: Two Direct Lake semantic models: Bicycle RTI Analytics (fleet operations) and Bicycle Ontology Model (entity relationships).

tasks.name: Ontology
tasks.description: Bicycle_Ontology_Model_New with 12 entity types, 23 relationship types. NB09 populates ontology-specific tables. Graph model visualizes connections.

tasks.name: Realtime activation
tasks.description: Reflex/Activator rules monitoring bike fleet thresholds and weather-triggered campaign conditions.

tasks.name: PowerBI Dashboard
tasks.description: Bicycle Fleet Operations Report — interactive Power BI visuals backed by the RTI Analytics semantic model.

tasks.name: Data Agent
tasks.description: AI data agents: Fleet Intelligence Agent (NL queries across lakehouse + SM + graph) and Ontology Data Agent (graph-based reasoning).

tasks.name: Power Automate Connector
tasks.description: Power Automate flows triggered by Activator alerts — sends notifications and kicks off rebalancing workflows.

tasks.name: Teams
tasks.description: Microsoft Teams channel receiving alert notifications from Power Automate flows.
